analysis.name: Tensor
analysis.summary: TNSR近期因技术突破和Solana NFT市场回暖而大幅上涨，但基本面仍存疑，流动性集中在DEX，24h下跌12%，短期追高风险大。

recommendation.invalidation: 若价格跌破0.14美元或成交量萎缩，则上涨逻辑失效

catalysts: Solana NFT市场回暖，Tensor作为龙头NFT市场受益
技术面突破前期下降趋势线，引发投机性买盘
Vector社交交易应用快速增长，年化交易量达75亿美元，50%费用归TNSR国库

latestNews.title: Why Is Tensor (TNSR) Price Pumping 43% Today? Technical Breakout Explained
latestNews.reason: 技术突破吸引短期资金

latestNews.title: Is the TNSR Rally Real? What Solana NFT Metrics Say About Today’s Crypto Surge
latestNews.reason: 质疑涨势持续性，需观察链上数据

latestNews.title: Tensor (TNSR) Price Explodes 342% in Bearish Market—Here’s What Might Be Behind It
latestNews.reason: 历史大涨案例，但时间较早，可能已反映

fundamentals: Tensor是Solana上领先的NFT市场，市场份额60-70%
Vector社交交易应用年化交易量75亿美元，日活2万，增长迅速
TNSR总供应量10亿，流通3.35亿，流通市值约1327万美元，FDV约3967万美元
协议费用50%归TNSR国库，但代币持有者收益机制不明确
marketRead: 24h价格下跌12%，但7日涨幅39%，14日涨幅35%，短期波动剧烈
DEX流动性5870万美元，但24h交易量仅3.99美元，流动性深度可疑
价格从ATH 2.23美元下跌98%，当前0.0397美元，处于历史低位
risks: NFT市场整体低迷，Solana NFT交易量下滑可能拖累TNSR
代币全流通，无锁仓，抛压风险大
DEX流动性高但交易量极低，可能存在操纵或虚假流动性
新闻多为旧闻或预测，缺乏实质性利好催化
watchlist: TNSR价格能否站稳0.04美元以上
sourceNotes: 价格数据来自Meteora DEX，与CoinMarketCap存在差异（CMC显示0.0397美元，DEX显示0.1575美元），需核实
新闻时间跨度大，部分为2025年11月，时效性不足

profile.name: Tensor
profile.description: The TNSR token governs the protocols underlying Tensor and Vector. 50% of protocol fees from both products accrue to the TNSR treasury. Tensor launched in July 2022 and is the leading NFT marketplace on Solana, commanding 60-70% of Solana NFT market share. It gained momentum by catering to NFTs traders instead of just collectors with real-time data, pro charting tools, and a fast terminal interface. Vector is the leading social trading app in crypto. Within 3 months of launch, it grew to $7.5 billion of annualized volume and 20k daily active users, both of which are doubling every 1-2 weeks. It generates $75M/year in fees of which 50% goes directly to the TNSR treasury.
